title: Clarity Pro Upscaler by philz1337x | Photorealistic Image Upscaling API
text:
Readme
Clarity Pro Upscaler ⚡
The flagship upscaler from Clarity AI
— fast, photorealistic, and built for serious work.
Powered by
Clarity AI
by
@philz1337x
.
What it’s for
Clarity Pro is the most capable mode in the Clarity family. It’s tuned for
photorealistic upscaling
of photos, AI-generated images, products, and artwork — without the plastic skin, hallucinated features, or identity drift that ruin most upscalers.
Use it when you need:
Razor-sharp detail
at scales other upscalers can’t reach
Up to 16x
scale, capped at 64 megapixels of output (~8K)
Creativity control
to dial between strict fidelity and stylized re-imagining
How it compares
Mode
Best for
Crystal Upscaler
Portraits and faces, maximum identity preservation
Clarity Pro Upscaler
Everything else — photos, AI art, products, scenes — at higher scale and quality
Clarity Upscaler
The original. Highly configurable, more knobs to tweak
Inputs
Parameter
Type
Default
Description
image
image
—
Input image to upscale
scale_factor
int
2
One of
2
,
4
,
8
, or
16
creativity
float
0
-10
to
10
. Negative is strict to the source, positive lets the model add detail
output_format
string
png
png
or
jpg
Output cap
Outputs are capped at
64 megapixels
(~8K). If your inputs × scale factor would exceed that, pick a smaller
scale_factor
.
Pricing
$0.03 per output megapixel
, with a
$0.03 minimum per image
. So a 1 MP output costs $0.03, a 16 MP output costs $0.48, and a 64 MP output costs $1.92.
Get started
Run it on Replicate
.
Built by
@philz1337x
— creator of
Clarity AI
.
Model created
2 weeks, 1 day ago
